description.value: Price 6,000 gp; Slot none; CL 3rd; Weight 2 lbs.; Aura faint transmutation DESCRIPTION This rune-carved wooden statuette of a fish feels very slippery. EFFECTS When placed at the helm of any Large water vehicle (such as a rowboat or shipâs boat), the friction between the boat and water is reduced considerably, allowing the boat to glide through the water more smoothly and swiftly. The boat gains a +20-foot enhancement bonus to its maximum speeds. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 3,000 gp; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells touch of the sea
